mapper.sql: id, user_id, address_name, province, city, district, detail_address, ST_AsText(location) as location, is_default, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1
